svg.text: Palette: Earth tones, greens, warm sunlight, water blues
Textures: Flowing lines, trees, rivers, open fields, gardens
Center art idea: Garden, commons, watershed, or village green
Export as HIGH-RES PNG from Canva (1440px+ square)
This grid shows where code overlays game tokens
Color bands on spaces can match your palette - we adapt the code
Center area is 100% free for your artwork

g.text: Group 6: Yellow (La Swelle Hotel, Gambling Den)
Group 7: Green (Calamity Ave, Easy Money, Wall St)
Group 8: Blue (Fairhope, Arden, Frances., Estates, Prosperity)
Bottom row goes RIGHT to LEFT (#1-#9)
Left column goes BOTTOM to TOP (#11-#19)
Top row goes LEFT to RIGHT (#21-#29)
